name: jp.co.unvgi.vtuber-system-base.ui-toolkit-shell
description: UI Toolkit-based main window shell for the VTuberSystemBase UI process (Display 1). Provides the root UIDocument with a 3-tab bar (Character / Stage-Lighting / Camera-Switcher), startup preload of all tab UIDocuments, display/hide-only tab switching to never freeze the main output frame, an Addressables-backed asynchronous asset loading facade with main-thread completion delivery, Command send / subscription facades over the core-ipc-foundation client abstractions, a common UI component library (slider / color picker / numbered list / toggle group), and skin (UXML/USS) extension points. Requires the core-ipc-foundation abstract assembly; never references its concrete transport implementation.
